headline: Clear calendar and quiet comms — use today to make real progress on the 'no ground truth' evals design doc (AE-1079) before the week ramps up.

Check if DeepRAG/BatchTransform pattern updates have any dependency on the evals framework you're designing

flags: Salesforce integration is down (INVALID_LOGIN) — no visibility into customer escalations. Fix urgently or escalate to IT.
Snowflake credentials are empty — all product telemetry and MBR dashboard metrics are inaccessible.
AE-1079 has no due date set; consider setting one this week to maintain accountability.
Autopilot is flagged Yellow/Risk in Big Rock TR — monitor whether evals work intersects with Autopilot risk mitigation.

outcomes.business_impact: No business-impacting actions captured yet today; restoring Salesforce/Snowflake access is the fastest path to regaining visibility on escalations and adoption metrics.
outcomes.product_adoption: Evals adoption metrics are unavailable due to broken Snowflake connection; advancing the no-ground-truth design doc (AE-1079) is the key adoption-driving work this week.

slack_summary: Quiet Monday — no meetings, no emails, no Slack activity. Top priority: use the open day to make serious progress on the AE-1079 generated evaluations (no ground truth) design doc, which feeds into the 26.4+ evals deliverable. Second priority: fix broken Salesforce and Snowflake credentials so you're not blind on escalations and metrics heading into the week. Zero meetings today.
